S.FORM: Ralph Bishop tatama, nalecuhan i 10 a bulad 1 a demiad, 1915 a mihcaan, Ralph Bishop, miunduay. (mapatay i 1974 a mihca)
S.PHON: *ar~ɾpħ bisħop tatama, nar~ɾəʦuħan i ** a bur~ɾad * a dəmiad, **** a miħʦaan, *ar~ɾpħ bisħop, miunduaj. (mapataj i **** a miħʦa)
